# Michael Ciccarelli — Design Engineer

> Multidisciplinary designer and developer with 20+ years building software.

Personal site of Michael Ciccarelli, a design engineer based in Las Vegas. AI-native and framework agnostic. He also plays poker and takes photos.

## Work With Me

I run [THIRD INDEX](https://thirdindex.co), a small digital studio building product interfaces, design systems, marketing sites, and editorial and commerce platforms for startups and consumer brands. Fractional or project-based. Book an intro call at https://cal.com/ciccarelli/intro or learn more at https://thirdindex.co.

## Now

Building [bkrl.app](https://bkrl.app), a bankroll tracker for poker players and bettors.

## Experience

- Design Engineer, Third Index — Las Vegas / Remote, 2025–present (founder; end-to-end builds across frontend, backend, and infrastructure)
- Design Engineer, Modern Treasury — New York, 2024–2025 (enterprise fintech interfaces, design systems, motion patterns, headless CMS)
- Senior Frontend Engineer, Metropolis — Brooklyn, 2022–2024 (metal.build, pod.xyz, EVM dApps, Farcaster integrations)
- Senior Engineer II, Axoni — New York, 2021–2022 (React apps, data visualizations, UI libraries for fintech)
- Lead Frontend Engineer, VICE — Brooklyn, 2014–2018 (led team of 10; publishing platform across VICE properties; LAMP-to-React migration)
- Web Developer, Condé Nast — New York, 2012–2014 (GQ, Wired, Architectural Digest)

## Selected Clients

Amazon, Pentagram, Modern Treasury, Elara, Axoni, One/Of, VICE, GQ, WIRED, Grey, Knoll.

## Projects

- [bkrl.app](https://bkrl.app): Bankroll management for poker players. Log sessions in natural language, track variance and ROI.

## Recent Client Work

- [Legend.xyz](https://legend-xyz.vercel.app): Frontend development — marketing site for Legend, an embedded smart contract wallet built as a UI/UX layer on top of open DeFi protocols.
- [Amazon: The Bar](https://amazonthe.bar): Frontend development — portfolio for a creative collective, with custom animations and dynamic layouts.
- [One/Of](https://shoponeof.com): Design and development — e-commerce platform for a made-to-order fashion label, with a custom booking system and Shopify checkout.
- [Elara.world](https://elara.world): Fullstack development — community hub combining content publishing with an integrated merchandise store.
- [Revolve Law](https://revolvelawgroup.com): Fullstack development — law firm site with subtle motion and streamlined contact flows.
- [Kelvon Agee](https://kelvonagee.com): Design and development — photography portfolio with optimized image delivery.
- [El Dorado](https://eldo.us): Frontend development — minimalist portfolio for an architecture studio.
